scripts.setup: git fetch origin --prune && mkdir -p .context/logs && (command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1 || npm install -g pnpm@10.34.1) && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
scripts.archive: mkdir -p .context/logs; log=".context/logs/archive-$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ).txt"; { echo '# Archive'; date -u; pwd; git status --short --branch; echo; git log --oneline -5; } | tee "$log"
